ux_issues.description: Usage counter shows 'used: 1' after 2 SendMessage calls (selection + planning). The selection mode message that triggered create_trip may not be counted, or only AI-response messages count. Minor discrepancy but could confuse users checking their quota.
ux_issues.suggestion: Clarify whether selection-mode messages count toward the daily limit.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: Trip sharing lifecycle works flawlessly. All security-critical behaviors pass: token revocation works, re-sharing generates a new token, old tokens stay dead after re-share, shared views contain no private data. The shared view includes full itinerary (7 days, 26 items) and booking info. AI created a comprehensive and well-structured Japan itinerary on the first request.
